how_to_apply: Bharat Sanchar Nigam Limited BSNL External Candidate Senior Executive Trainee SET Recruitment 2026. Candidate Can Apply Between 05/02/2026 to 31/03/2026.
Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Recruitment Jobs Application Form in BSNL SET Recruitment Jobs 2026.
Kindly Check and Collect the All Document - Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details.
Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form - Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc.
Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully.
If Candidate Are Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Pay and Complete Your Form
Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
